title: Apple Unveils 'Apple Business' All-in-One Platform - MacRumors
content:
### Apple Released Yet Another New Product Today

Friday March 20, 2026 2:39 pm PDT by Joe Rossignol

Apple has unveiled a whopping nine new products so far this March, including an iPhone 17e, iPad Air models with the M4 chip, MacBook Air models with the M5 chip, MacBook Pro models with M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, the all-new MacBook Neo, an updated Studio Display, a higher-end Studio Display XDR, AirPods Max 2, and now the Nike Powerbeats Pro 2. iPhone 17e features the same overall design as...

Read Full Article

### New Apple TV and HomePod Mini Remain 'Ready' to Launch

Sunday March 22, 2026 6:33 am PDT by Joe Rossignol [...] These include brand profiles with logos and details, customizable place cards in Apple Maps with photos, hours, and actions such as ordering or reservations, and analytics showing how users discover and interact with locations. Branded communications will extend to the Mail app and iCloud Mail, as well as order tracking in Wallet, and that businesses using Tap to Pay on iPhone can display their branding during transactions.

Apple also announced a new advertising feature tied to ‌Apple Maps‌, scheduled to launch in the United States and Canada later this summer. Businesses will be able to create ads that appear at the top of search results in Maps, as well as within a new Suggested Places experience. [...] • 21 Time-Saving iPhone Tips

### 蘋果今天又發布了一款新產品

太平洋夏令時間 2026 年 3 月 20 日星期五下午 2:39，作者：Joe Rossignol

蘋果在今年三月至今已發表了多達九款新產品，包括 iPhone 17e、搭載 M4 晶片的 iPad Air 機型、搭載 M5 晶片的 MacBook Air 機型、搭載 M5 Pro 和 M5 Max 晶片的 MacBook Pro 機型、全新的 MacBook Neo、更新的 Studio Display、更高階的 Studio Display XDR、AirPods Max 2，以及現在的 Nike Powerbeats Pro 2。iPhone 17e 具有與... 相同的整體設計。

閱讀完整文章

### 新款 Apple TV 和 HomePod mini 仍「準備就緒」待發布

太平洋夏令時間 2026 年 3 月 22 日星期日上午 6:33，作者：Joe Rossignol [...] 這些功能包括帶有標誌和詳細資訊的品牌檔案、Apple 地圖中可自訂的地點卡（包含照片、營業時間以及訂購或預訂等操作），以及顯示用戶如何發現和與地點互動的分析數據。品牌通訊將擴展到「郵件」App 和 iCloud 郵件，以及「錢包」中的訂單追蹤；使用 iPhone 上的「輕觸支付」(Tap to Pay) 的商家可以在交易期間顯示其品牌標誌。

蘋果還宣布了一項與 ‌Apple 地圖‌相關的新廣告功能，預計將於今年夏天晚些時候在美國和加拿大推出。商家將能夠創建在「地圖」搜尋結果頂部以及新的「建議地點」體驗中顯示的廣告。 [...]

Friday March 20, 2026 2:39 pm PDT by Joe Rossignol

Apple has unveiled a whopping nine new products so far this March, including an iPhone 17e, iPad Air models with the M4 chip, MacBook Air models with the M5 chip, MacBook Pro models with M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, the all-new MacBook Neo, an updated Studio Display, a higher-end Studio Display XDR, AirPods Max 2, and now the Nike Powerbeats Pro 2. iPhone 17e features the same overall design as...

### New Apple TV and HomePod Mini Remain 'Ready' to Launch

Sunday March 22, 2026 6:33 am PDT by Joe Rossignol [...] Sunday March 22, 2026 6:33 am PDT by Joe Rossignol

Apple has unveiled nine new products this month, but the wait continues for the next-generation Apple TV 4K and HomePod mini models. In his Power On newsletter today, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman said new versions of the Apple TV and HomePod mini have been "ready" since last year, but he reiterated that Apple has held off on releasing them until the more personalized version of Siri and other...

Read Full Article • 135 comments

### iOS 26.4 Adds Two New Features to CarPlay

Tuesday March 24, 2026 1:55 pm PDT by Joe Rossignol [...] The latest information aligns with a growing body of mixed reports surrounding the iPhone 18 Pro models. Earlier claims from multiple sources, including Bloomberg's Mark Gurman and display industry analyst Ross Young, indicated that Apple would reduce the size of the ‌Dynamic Island‌, likely by relocating some ‌Face ID‌ components beneath the display.

Other sources have cast doubt on the extent of these changes. Weibo leaker "Digital Chat Station" recently claimed that the ‌iPhone 18 Pro‌ models may reuse much of their existing front-facing design, with ‌Face ID‌ and the ‌Dynamic Island‌ remaining "largely unchanged" and more ambitious under-display implementations pushed to a later generation.

其他消息來源則對這些變化的程度表示懷疑。微博爆料者「數位閒聊站」最近聲稱，‌iPhone 18 Pro‌ 機型可能會沿用大部分現有的正面設計，‌Face ID‌ 和 ‌動態島‌ 將「大致保持不變」，而更具野心的螢幕下實作則會推遲到下一代。

### iOS 18

## Author

Ryan Christoffel   iryantldr [...] Go to the 9to5Mac home page

 iOS 18

# Apple releases new updates for old versions of iOS, macOS, watchOS, more

Ryan Christoffel | Mar 24 2026 - 10:40 am PT

4 Comments

Apple just shipped iOS 26.4 and its companion updates for users running the latest OS. The company also debuted new software updates today for old iOS, macOS, iPadOS, and watchOS versions, including iOS 18.7.7 and more.

## iOS 18.7.7 and more OS updates focus on security fixes

If you use any Apple devices, there’s a very good chance you have new software updates available to install today.

Apple’s flagship releases today include iOS 26.4, iPadOS 26.4, macOS 26.4, and more.

But in many cases, even devices running older OS versions have received new software releases. [...] Per Aaron Perris on X, Apple has also released the following pre-OS 26 updates:

 iOS 18.7.7
 iPadOS 18.7.7
 macOS 15.7.5
 macOS 14.8.5
 watchOS 8.8.2
 watchOS 5.3.10

So if you’re running iOS or iPadOS 18, macOS Sonoma or Sequoia, or watchOS 8 or 5, these updates will offer the latest enhancements on your devices.

Apple’s release notes say these new updates focus on security updates. So to ensure your device is protected against the most recently discovered vulnerabilities, be sure to install the latest software.

Are you still running any of these older software versions? When do you plan to update to OS 26? Let us know in the comments.

### Best iPhone accessories
title_zh: Apple 為舊版 iOS、macOS、watchOS 等發布新更新 - 9to5Mac
content_zh:
Apple 剛剛發布了 iOS 26.4 及其針對運行最新作業系統的用戶的配套更新。該公司今天也為舊版 iOS、macOS、iPadOS 和 watchOS 發布了新的軟體更新，包括 iOS 18.7.7 等。

### iOS 18.7.7 及更多作業系統更新著重於安全性修復

如果您使用任何 Apple 裝置，今天很有可能會有新的軟體更新可供安裝。

Apple 今天發布的旗艦版本包括 iOS 26.4、iPadOS 26.4、macOS 26.4 等。

但在許多情況下，即使是運行舊版作業系統的裝置也收到了新的軟體版本。[...] 根據 Aaron Perris 在 X 上的消息，Apple 也發布了以下 OS 26 之前的更新：

*   iOS 18.7.7
*   iPadOS 18.7.7
*   macOS 15.7.5
*   macOS 14.8.5
*   watchOS 8.8.2
*   watchOS 5.3.10

因此，如果您正在運行 iOS 或 iPadOS 18、macOS Sonoma 或 Sequoia，或 watchOS 8 或 5，這些更新將為您的裝置提供最新的增強功能。

Apple 的發布說明指出，這些新更新著重於安全性更新。因此，為確保您的裝置免受最新發現的漏洞侵害，請務必安裝最新的軟體。

您是否仍在運行這些舊版軟體？您打算何時更新到 OS 26？請在評論中告訴我們。
